title: NeoVillagers
description: This mod adds new villagers and blocks to improve the vanilla minecraft.
body:
# Neo-Villagers

This mod adds additional villagers with new jobs, all with unique trades, workstations and advancements.

## Designer
This villager trades decoration items including the new blocks added with this mod.

### Workstation
The Designer table is used to craft items of decoration provided by this mod (Barrel, Chest, Box, Composter, Cauldron). It also serves as a Designer's job site block.

All of its recipes require just one ingredient to produce the block (in different quantities). It allows skipping steps and it is more efficient to craft the blocks. For example a log can directly turned into a Decoration Box; crafting normally this product requires multiple steps and spend more resources.

#### Crafting
Requires two blocks of stone (any type), one flower (any type), three wooden plank and one iron ingot. To get the recipe is required to have paper and iron ingot in the inventory.

## Hunter
This villager trades hunting items, and sword tiers (iron and diamond with enchantments).

### Workstation
The Hunting table is used to give spawn eggs, the egg is selected randomly and needs an emerald and a arrow.

The eggs can be selected using special element for each kind of egg.

#### Crafting
Requires one leather, one bow, two arrows and three planks (any type). To get the recipe is required to have lether and any log type in the inventory.

## Lumberjack
This villager trades tree logs, leaves, and axe tiers (iron and diamond with enchantments).

### Workstation
The Woodworking table is used to craft wood related blocks in smaller and more precise quantities than crafting, and is more efficient than crafting for certain recipes. It also serves as a lumberjack's job site block.

All of its recipes require just one ingredient and produce a item (in different quantities). It allows skipping steps to craft certain blocks. For example a log can directly turned into fence; crafting normally this product requires multiple steps.

#### Crafting
Requires two stone pressure plate, one iron ingot and any type of log. To get the recipe is required to have stone and iron ingot in the inventory.

## Wizard
This villager trades nether items.

### Workstation
The Unenchanting table is used to recover an enchantment from an armor, weapon, tool or book. It also serves as a Wizard's job site block.

To recover an enchantment is needed an item with the enchantment to remove, a number of Lapis block (it depends of the enchantment rarity, can be from 1 to 4) and a writable book. The process spends experience from the player (it is between 1 to 4 based in the enchantment rarity).

It is possible that the enchantment level decrease when it is recovered from the item.

#### Crafting
Requires two lapis lazuli, three lapis block, one grindstone, one enchanting table and three amethyst block. To get the recipe is required crafting the grindstone and the enchanting table.

## New blocks for decoration
These blocks can be crafted directly using the Designer table.

### Decoration Barrel
Decoration barrel is a block similar to the Barrel that can be used as decoration when a barrel is required, it does not serve as fisherman's job site block.

#### Crafting
It can be crafted using a normal barrel and a wooden slab, or using the Designer table. 
To get the recipe is required to have a barrel in the inventory.

### Decoration Chest
Decoration chest is a block similar to the Chest that can be used as decoration when a single chest is required. It does not store  any kind of items.

#### Crafting
It can be crafted using a normal chest and a wooden slab, or using the Designer table. To get the recipe is required to have a chest in the inventory.

### Decoration Box
Decoration box is a block similar to the Note block that can be used as decoration to represent a box without the features of note box.

#### Crafting
It can be crafted using a normal note block and a wooden slab, or using the Designer table. To get the recipe is required to have a note block in the inventory.

### Decoration Box Cross
Decoration box is a block similar to the Note block that can be used as decoration to represent another kind of box without the features of note box. It has a different design than normal Box.

#### Crafting
It can be crafted using a normal note block and a wooden slab, or using the Designer table. To get the recipe is required to have a note block in the inventory.

### Decoration Box Fix
Decoration box is a block similar to the Note block that can be used as decoration to represent another kind of box without the features of note box. It has a different design than normal Box.

#### Crafting
It can be crafted using a normal note block and a wooden slab, or using the Designer table. To get the recipe is required to have a note block in the inventory.

### Decoration Composter
Decoration composter is a block similar to the Composter that can be used as decoration to represent a big flowerpot, it looks as it has filled of potting soil and it does not serve as farmer's job site block.

#### Crafting
It can be crafted using a normal composter and a wooden slab, or using the Designer table. To get the recipe is required to have a composter in the inventory.

### Decoration Cauldron
Decoration cauldron is a block similar to the Cauldron that can be used as decoration when single cauldron is required, it does not serve as leatherworker's job site block. It supports filling with water using a water bucket, and getting the water using an empty bucket.

#### Crafting
It can be crafted using a normal cauldron and two iron ingot, or using the Designer table. To get the recipe is required to have a cauldron in the inventory.

# Support
If you want to have only specific villager from this collection you can see the following mods:
- [The Lumberjack](https://modrinth.com/mod/neovillagers-lumberjack)
- [The Designer](https://modrinth.com/mod/neovillagers-designer)
- [The Hunter](https://modrinth.com/mod/neovillagers-hunter)
- [The Wizard](https://modrinth.com/mod/neovillagers-wizard)

Any issue, comment or suggestion to improve or add into this collection, please include it in the following link: [feedback](https://github.com/ryupanqui78/minecraft-neovillagers-lumberjack/issues)
